---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Software — Lucia S. Layritz"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <p class="category">Software</p>
  <h1>Software</h1>
  <p style="max-width:600px; color:#444; margin-top:0.8rem;">
    Code to reproduce all my first-author paper is available from my github. Should you need any primary data not hosted on Github or Zenodo or are unable to run any of the scripts, please reach out!

  </p>
</div>

<div class="project-grid">

  <div class="project-card">
    <p class="lang">R</p>
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/disturbanceBorealLPJ" target="_blank">disturbanceBorealLPJ</a></h3>
    <p>Code reproducing Layritz et al., Biogeosciences, 2025. <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/bg-22-3635-2025" target="_blank">doi:10.5194/bg-22-3635-2025</a></p>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <p class="lang">R</p>
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/borealRecovery" target="_blank">borealRecovery</a></h3>
    <p>Code reproducing Layritz et al., JGR Biogeosciences, 2026.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <p class="lang">R</p>
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/stableEWS_paper" target="_blank">stableEWS_paper</a></h3>
    <p>Code reproducing Layritz et al., Scientific Reports, 2025. <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-88659-0" target="_blank">doi:10.1038/s41598-025-88659-0</a></p>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <p class="lang">Jupyter Notebook</p>
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/alphastableTransient" target="_blank">alphastableTransient</a></h3>
    <p>Code to reproduce "Disturbances and long transients create illusion of stable states".</p>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card">
    <p class="lang">R</p>
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/TidyTuesday" target="_blank">TidyTuesday</a></h3>
    <p>A collection of data visualisations made for the weekly #TidyTuesday challenge in R.</p>
  </div>

</div>
```
